patch.value: Active migration umbrella for bundled managed extensions: move beads/todos into packaged .agents sources, remove auto-load and static command stubs, remove pm install, and deliver parity tests/docs with no duplicate PM items.

Bundled beads/todos are shipped but not auto-installed, pm extension installs them via shorthand and explicit paths, pm install surface is removed, and build/test/coverage/docs verification passes without regressions.
Migrate beads and todos from auto-loaded built-ins to bundled managed extensions shipped under .agents/pm/extensions, remove pm install, and preserve user-safe extension lifecycle behavior.
